svg.text: Top-down: User question travels through Planner, then branches by path. SQL path is the deep one.

g.text: text + optional chart + Excel + Show SQL + Agent trace

Note · Out-of-band evals NOT shown here
This tree shows ONE chat turn's control flow. Out-of-band evals run on a separate cadence and are not per-turn:
02_enrich_topics.py (offline Topic Classifier) · 03_eval_topic_classifier · test_planner · test_orchestrator · test_golden_sql · verify_evals · eval_prompts.md → see tests/README.md
